en: Okay, Abu, let's go!
Try this! Your taste buds will dance and sing!
ko: 이거 먹어봐! 혀가 춤추고 노래할 거야!

en: Hey! Get your paws off me!
Get away from here, you cursed filthy ape!
Nice going, Abu. Breakfast is served.
With dumplings, cake, and a lovely portion...
Pretty lady, buy a pot. No finer pot in brass or silver.
ko: 아가씨, 냄비 사세요. 놋쇠든 은이든 이보다 좋은 건 없어요.

en: Sugar dates! Sugar dates and figs! Sugar dates and pistachios!
Would the lady like a necklace? A pretty necklace for a pretty lady.
ko: 아가씨 목걸이 하실래요? 예쁜 아가씨에겐 예쁜 목걸이.

en: Fresh fish! We catch them, you buy them!
ko: 신선한 생선! 우리가 잡고, 손님이 사세요!

en: No, I don't think so. Oh, excuse me.
Oh!
I'm really very sorry.
Wow!
Oh, you must be hungry. Here you go.
You'd better be able to pay for that.
Pay? No one steals from my cart!
ko: 값이요? 내 수레에서 훔치는 놈은 없어!

en: I'm sorry, sir. I don't have any money.
If you let me go to the palace, I can get some from the Sultan.
ko: 궁전에 가면 술탄님께 돈을 받아올 수 있어요.

en: Do you know what the penalty is for stealing?
No! No, please! Thank you, kind sir. I'm so glad you found her.
ko: 안 돼! 제발! 감사합니다. 찾고 있었거든요.

en: I've been looking all over for you. What are you doing? Just play along.
ko: 어딜 가고 있었어. 뭐 하는 거야? 맞춰봐.

en: You know this girl? Sadly, yes. She is my sister.
ko: 이 아가씨를 아나? 안타깝게도, 네. 제 여동생이에요.

en: She's a little crazy. She said she knew the Sultan.
She thinks the monkey is the Sultan.
Oh, wise Sultan, how may I serve you?
Tragic, isn't it? But no harm done.
Now come along, sis. Time to go see the doctor.
ko: 자, 가자, 여동생아. 의사 선생님 만나러 가자.

en: Oh, hello, doctor. How are you?
ko: 아, 안녕하세요, 의사 선생님. 잘 지내세요?

en: No, no, not that one. Come on, Sultan.
ko: 아니, 그 의사가 아니야. 가자, 술탄.

en: Come back here, you little thieves!
With all due respect, Your Highness,
couldn't we just wait for a real storm?
Save your breath, Iago. Faster! Yes, almighty evil one!
ko: 잔소리 집어치워, 이아고. 더 빨리! 네, 전능하신 악의 화신이시여!

en: The past sands of time
reveal to me the one who can enter the cave.
Yes, yes, there he is.
My diamond in the rough.
That's him? That's the clown we've been waiting for?
Let's have the gods extend him an invitation to the palace.
Shall we?
To be continued...
